example_french: Être est le verbe de la semaine.
example_english: To be is the verb of the week.
On Monday, I am in class.
On Tuesday, Samira is at the cafe.
On Wednesday, Marc is at the park.
On Thursday, we are in class.
On Friday, I am with Samira.
On Saturday, Marc is at the cafe.

example_french: Dimanche, je suis à la maison.
example_english: On Sunday, I am at home.

example_french: Alex et Samira sont en classe.
example_english: Alex and Samira are in class.
We have a class on Monday.

example_french: J'ai un frère et une sœur.
example_english: I have a brother and a sister.

example_french: J'ai un livre, mais pas de téléphone.
example_english: I have a book, but no phone.

example_french: Non, je n'ai pas de téléphone.
example_english: No, I do not have a phone.

example_french: Le livre est dans le sac.
example_english: The book is in the bag.
